about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: About the company
about.heroText: Czech-Slovak real estate agency specializing in the sale of foreign seaside properties.
about.intro: Relax Properties is a Czech-Slovak real estate agency specializing in the sale of foreign seaside properties. We help clients find apartments, houses, and investment properties tailored to their needs in popular destinations such as Bulgaria, Greece, Croatia, and Spain.
about.introSecondary: Our goal is to ensure a safe, transparent, and worry-free process when buying property abroad. Thanks to years of experience and cooperation with verified partners directly in each country, we provide clients with a complete service — from property selection to legal services and after-sale care.
about.whyUsIntro: We build on values and a transparent approach that make us a reliable partner on your real estate journey.

whyUs.title: Complete service under one roof
whyUs.description: From the initial consultation and thorough understanding of your needs, through market analysis and property selection, to complete legal services, key handover, and after-sale care. We give every client our full attention.

whyUs.title: Transparency and fairness
whyUs.description: We communicate openly and directly. Every step of the process is set up clearly and understandably. We always keep you informed about each and every step. With us, you don't have to worry about hidden fees or unexpected surprises.

whyUs.title: Individual approach
whyUs.description: Every client and every property has its own story. That's why we approach everyone personally and design solutions tailored to your needs, goals, and expectations.

whyUs.title: Local market expertise
whyUs.description: We actively monitor and analyze the real estate market. We work with colleagues directly in each country who know the local environment, prices, language, and legislation. This allows us to provide you with accurate and relevant information, saving you time and money.

about.visionTitle: We always stand on your side
about.visionText: Our goal is to be your trusted partner when buying property — we always stand on your side, see the deal through your eyes, and ensure the entire process is safe and in compliance with legislation.
visionPoints: Every sale begins with a thorough verification of ownership rights and all legal requirements.
We cooperate with local experts in each location to ensure the deal is completely safe and risk-free.
When buying property, you are never alone — we guide you through every step and make sure all your interests are fully protected.

about.ctaText: Enjoy a stress-free real estate process — safe and transparent, starting right here with us at Relax Properties.

contact.title: Contact

contact.introText: Whether you're looking for a property to live in or invest in, our team of experts is ready to answer all your questions. Don't hesitate to contact us – we'll be happy to help.

companyInfo.name: Relax Properties s. r. o.
companyInfo.registration: The company is registered in the Commercial Register of the District Court Bratislava I, Section Sro, File No.: 152886/B.

faq.q: How does buying property abroad work?
faq.a: We'll guide you through the entire process step by step. From property selection, through legal verification, to contract signing and ownership transfer. We work with local lawyers and notaries.
Our commission is standard for the real estate market and depends on the property value. We'll inform you of the exact amount at the first consultation. No hidden fees.

faq.q: Can I view the property in person?
faq.a: Of course! We organize property viewings for our clients. We can plan an entire trip including multiple viewings in one day.
Yes, we work with banks and mortgage advisors who will help you find the best financing conditions for your property.

buyingProcess.title: Buying Process
buyingProcess.subtitle: How to Buy Property
buyingProcess.heroText: Your guide to buying property abroad
buyingProcess.selectCountry: Select a country to view the buying process

advantages.title: Legal Security
advantages.description: We work with local lawyers and notaries to ensure a safe and secure transaction.

advantages.title: Investment Potential
advantages.description: Seaside properties offer stable value growth and rental income opportunities.

advantages.title: Personal Guidance
advantages.description: From first contact to the keys — our team guides you through the entire process.

advantages.title: No Hidden Fees
advantages.description: Transparent terms with no surprises. You'll know all costs upfront.

faq.q: Can I buy property abroad remotely?
faq.a: Yes, with a power of attorney the entire process can be completed without being present in person. However, we recommend at least one personal viewing.

faq.q: What are the total purchase costs?
faq.a: In addition to the property price, expect notary fees (1-2%), transfer tax (2-10% depending on country), and legal fees. We'll prepare a detailed cost breakdown for you.

faq.q: How long does the process take?
faq.a: From selection to ownership transfer typically takes 4-8 weeks, depending on the country and property type.
EU citizens can purchase property without restrictions in all our destinations. For non-EU citizens, specific rules apply depending on the country.

buyingProcess.readyText: Contact us and let's start looking for your dream seaside property together.

bulgaria.name: Bulgaria
bulgaria.intro: Property prices in Bulgaria are growing as the second fastest in the EU. The country is expected to join the Eurozone soon and is a member of the EU and NATO.

process.title: Property Selection
process.description: We'll help you choose the right property according to your requirements, including viewings.

process.title: Reservation
process.description: Signing a reservation agreement and a deposit of €2,000 – €5,000.

process.title: Legal Check
process.description: Our lawyer will review all documents and verify the property's history.

process.title: Contract Signing
process.description: Purchase agreement at the notary. Remote signing via power of attorney is possible.

process.title: Ownership Transfer
process.description: After payment, the property is transferred to your name.

croatia.name: Croatia
croatia.intro: Croatia has been part of Schengen and the Eurozone since 2023. The Adriatic coast offers high tourist potential.

process.title: Property Selection
process.description: Together we'll find the ideal property on the coast or inland.

process.title: Preliminary Contract
process.description: Pre-purchase agreement with a 10% deposit.

process.title: Legal Check
process.description: Verification of ownership rights and cadastral registration.

process.title: Purchase Agreement
process.description: Signing at the notary with official translation.

process.title: Cadastral Registration
process.description: The property is registered in your name. The process takes approximately 30 days.

spain.name: Spain
spain.intro: Spain offers a stable legal system and year-round sunshine. Costa Blanca and Costa del Sol are among the most popular destinations.

process.title: NIE Number
process.description: We'll help you obtain a Spanish tax identification number.

process.title: Property Selection
process.description: We'll find a property matching your criteria and organize viewings.

process.title: Arras Contract
process.description: Preliminary contract with a 10% deposit.

process.title: Escritura
process.description: Signing of the public deed at the notary.

process.title: Registration
process.description: Registration in the property register and transfer of utilities.

greece.name: Greece
greece.intro: Greece offers attractive seaside properties with growing investment potential. The entire purchase process is handled through a lawyer who represents you at every step.

process.title: Property Selection
process.description: Choose a property according to your preferences, or we'll gladly help you with the selection. Once you've chosen, we verify availability and calculate the complete price including all fees associated with buying property in Greece.

process.title: Property Viewing
process.description: There are two ways to view properties: in person during your visit to Greece, or via video call (WhatsApp/Skype). Video viewings are the most popular method — we show you the property, surroundings, and share a recording for your review.

process.title: Price Negotiation
process.description: We compare prices in the area and negotiate the best possible price on your behalf. The agency commission is already included in the property price. The entire process is handled through a lawyer who guarantees the transaction.

process.title: Greek Tax Number & Bank Account
process.description: The first step after selecting your property is obtaining a Greek tax identification number (similar to a national ID number). This is required for purchasing property, opening a bank account, signing contracts, and transferring utilities.

process.title: Reservation Deposit & Purchase Price
process.description: The reservation deposit is 10% of the property price, paid to the lawyer's escrow account. After signing the preliminary contract at the notary, the property is taken off the market. The remaining balance is paid within the following month.

process.title: Notary Transfer
process.description: We prepare all contracts and documents in your language and Greek. A licensed Greek lawyer registered with the bar association represents you throughout. All purchase funds are held in the lawyer's escrow and released to the seller only after the property is transferred to your name.

process.title: Purchase Fees
process.description: Total fees including taxes are approximately 7% of the property price. The exact amount is determined by the notary based on the property location.
items: Preparation of all contracts and documents
Legal property check (title deed, building permits, no debts or liens)
Lawyer fees: approx. 1.5% of property price
Notary fees: approx. 2% of property price
Property transfer tax: approx. 3.5% of property price
Bank transfer fees: approx. 0.1% of property price

process.title: You Become the Owner
process.description: During the notary process, all ownership rights are transferred to you. The cadastre records the transfer based on the Notarial Act. As a bonus, you receive property insurance for 1 year free of charge and property cleaning before your arrival.

process.title: Ownership Costs
process.description: Running costs include water and electricity (paid monthly, similar to home country rates). Annual property tax depends on property size — as a new owner, you are exempt for the first year.
items: Water & electricity — monthly payments based on consumption

process.title: Renting Your Property
process.description: We can help you arrange professional property management for rentals, including cleaning, linen changes, and guest services. Rental income varies based on property level, location, and rental period length — but it is certainly worthwhile.
